Every morning her owl owl feather. When winter snow flew feathers flew.

She hooted. Owls. Maybe hoot owl owls? Maybe just.

Starlings flock. Owls star. She swooped.

Fly fly! She flutter.

In owl. Down.

No moose.

That day she flew.

Her feathers. Blue blue.

So.
